benefits.description: Brought all liver/metabolic lab values back to normal range within 3 months, even while using enclomiphene which is noted to be hard on the liver

protocol_notes: User had similar abnormal lab results due to an autoimmune issue. Adopted a diet of only lean meat, leafy greens, low starch vegetables and intermittent fasting. Also supplemented with glutathione, bile salts, and enclomiphene alongside an 8-week oral BPC-157 cycle. All values returned to normal range within 3 months.
